_comment: Day 7 X mirror queue entry — MP-accountability piece. Lists the 12 Liberal MPs (sponsor, cabinet speakers, House Leader, SECU members) who moved Bill C-22 to committee. publish-next-day.ts prepends this to scripts/social-brief/x-mirror-queue.json on publish day.
matchSubstring: Bill C-22 is at committee. Here are the 12 Liberal MPs
text:
Bill C-22 is at committee. Here are the 12 Liberal MPs who put it there:

→ Sponsor: PS Min Anandasangaree
→ Cabinet speakers: Fraser, Sahota, Lattanzio
→ House Leader: MacKinnon
→ SECU (7): Duclos (chair), Acan, Dandurand, Housefather, Powlowski, Ramsay, Sodhi

Contact info on the article.
